user_prompt: Assist with hololithic display a repair
prayer:
Approach the hololithic display with reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken from torment.
Invoke the sacred rites of repair upon the hololithic display's fractured projectors and lumen arrays.
Anoint each crystal lattice with blessed oils whilst chanting the Canticle of Restoration.
Realign the phase emitters under the Omnissiah's watchful gaze, verifying the repair through diagnostic litanies.
Praise the hololithic display as its projections bloom anew in holy luminescence.

user_prompt: Guide me through auspex scanner an operation
prayer:
Kneel before the auspex scanner and intone the Invocation of Functionality.
Initiate the operation of the auspex scanner by sanctifying its sensor vanes with sacred unguents.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the auspex scanner to guide its sweeps through etheric voids.
Cycle power flows whilst reciting binaric hymns, ensuring flawless operation under Omnissiah's decree.

In emergency, grasp the plasma weapon and whisper the Urgency Doxology to its volatile core.
Commence diagnostics on the plasma weapon, probing flask integrity with auspex probes.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the plasma weapon to reveal containment flaws or flux anomalies.
Chant binaric catechisms as you recalibrate gyrometric stabilizers, honoring the Omnissiah's wrathful fire.

Verify the star chart's cycling through prophetic alignments, sanctified in astral oils.

prayer:

Awaken the Machine Spirit of the bionics interface through servo-rituals of alignment.

Intone the Litany of Precision as the bionics interface locks upon foes in Omnissiah's aim.

Test the melta charge's calibrated fury under diagnostic auspex, praising the Omnissiah's melting gaze.

user_prompt: Bless the valve assembly for blessing
prayer:

Seal the rite with oil-anointed torque, honoring the Omnissiah in every pressurized whisper.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for thermal regulator an operation
prayer:

Commence operation of the thermal regulator through ritual venting of excess heat-souls.

Verify flawless operation as blessed coolant courses, under the Omnissiah's temperate mercy.
